markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the 12-week sprint's progress at the halfway point (week 6).](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Positive Mid-Sprint Review:** The partnership is on track. GrowthX will use Navan's feedback on initial drafts to improve future content quality and reduce review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Streamlining Publishing:** Navan will provide stand-in images to unblock publishing for 4 articles. Aida will investigate a pipeline error preventing the generation of GrowthX's own featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**CTA Strategy Defined:** CTAs will be standardized using a new artifact. The strategy is to use gated assets for top-of-funnel content and "Request a Demo" for bottom-of-funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Competitive Content Strategy:** Navan approved creating content for Coupa (a key competitor) but not Engine. Brex (a partner) will be handled with positive framing.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Topics

### Mid-Sprint Review (Week 6)

  - [Tyler (GrowthX Account Executive) joined for a formal pulse check at the sprint's halfway point.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Navan's feedback was positive, noting the partnership is organized and on track.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Key Improvement Area:** Initial drafts require significant edits.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Aida will analyze feedback on the last 3 articles to proactively adjust the writing style for future drafts, aiming to reduce Navan's review time.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [**Identified Friction Point:** Navan's internal review and legal approval process is a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [**GrowthX Insight:** This is a common issue that delays performance signals.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Navan Action:** Libby will meet with legal post-holidays to define clear guidelines. This could enable a "flagging" system where legal only reviews specific content (e.g., competitor mentions), streamlining the process.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Content & Publishing Pipeline

  - [**Unblocking Publishing:** 4 articles are ready for publication (3 new, 1 calibration refresh) but are blocked by missing featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [**Navan Action:** Libby will provide stand-in images from Navan's asset bank to unblock the process.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Aida will investigate a pipeline error preventing the generation of GrowthX's own featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Upcoming Deliveries:**](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [5 new articles are in progress for delivery by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Deliveries will pause for a "quiet week" during the last week of December, resuming in January.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### CTA & Data Strategy

  - [**CTA Standardization:** A new artifact will standardize CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Navan Action:** Rich will provide a list of 9 evergreen lead-gen assets (guides, webinars) for key personas.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Aida will add these assets to the artifact and work with Kirkland (dev) to integrate it into the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Data & Statistics Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [**New Artifact:** Aida will create an artifact of key statistics and proprietary data for consistent, reliable use across all content.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [**New Content Type:** GrowthX will create "stats roundup" articles, which are strong backlink magnets.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
          - [**Challenge:** AI struggles to verify primary data sources.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
          - [**Proposed Solution:** Feed the AI verified sources (e.g., Navan's own stats articles, industry reports) to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

### Competitive Content Strategy

  - [**Brex:** A partner, not a competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**Action:** Avoid negative framing. The "Brex vs. Ramp" topic will be changed to "Ramp vs. Navan."](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**Engine:** Not a top competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [**Action:** Do not create content for Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Coupa:** A key competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**Action:** Create content for Coupa.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**Keyword Tactic:** For topics like "Concur vs. Coupa," add "vs. Navan" to the title to insert Navan into the conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Aida will analyze SERPs to determine if related topics can be collapsed into a single article.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Libby:**](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

      - [Meet with legal post-holidays to define content guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Follow up with Nikita for the official AI messaging doc.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
      - [Approve new AI-related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [**Rich:**](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [Provide a list of 9 evergreen lead-gen assets for the CTA artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Analyze feedback to refine the writing style for future drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Investigate the pipeline error preventing featured image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Add Navan's assets to the CTA artifact and coordinate integration with Kirkland (dev).](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Create the "key statistics" artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Analyze SERPs for Coupa-related topics to consolidate where possible.](https://fathom.video/share/by4EYPmP6TT28pgs8zQDxEjP_npyjwkU?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
